pack.icp: Freelance designers with 3-20 recurring clients who spend more than 2 hours per month chasing overdue invoices.
pack.wtp: Direct WTP quote exists for automatic reminders.
pack.competitor_gap: Generic invoice tools do not handle client relationship tone.
pack.positioning: Relationship-aware invoice reminders for freelance designers.
pack.outreach: Guaranteed 10x collections. I scraped your profile and know you need this. I will keep following up.
pack.landing: Invoice follow-up reminders that keep client relationships intact.
pack.roadmap: Day 1: interview 5 designers. Day 2: test $19/mo. Day 3: publish landing page. Day 4-6: collect replies. Day 7: decide.
